shoppinglist.languagePrompt: First off, sugar, go ahead and pick your tongue and that home page you fancy so we can get to movin' with Murmli.
shoppinglist.welcome:
Welcome to Murmli, your sweet lil' smart app for fixin' recipes, shoppin', and eatin' right.

 This here app uses that AI magic to make translatin' and pickin' out recipes easy as pie. You can even whip up your own recipes and put 'em right on your shoppin' list to make your day run smooth as butter.
shoppinglist.quickGuide:
Just type whatever you're achin' for into that box, and Murmli's gonna use its brain to add it to the shoppin' list.

 All your goods get sorted by them supermarket aisles so you ain't wanderin' 'round like a lost calf.

 Once they're added, just give 'em a tap to find somethin' else instead.
shoppinglist.options: Find more ways to go about it, like sharin' or sortin' your list, up in that menu in the top right corner. Share that list with your darlin' so y'all can work on it together. You can stop sharin' whenever you feel like it.

planner.welcome: Now, you tell us down yonder how many folks you're feedin' and how many meals you're plannin'. You can just talk plain in that box tellin' us what you're hankerink' for, and the AI's gonna listen real close to pick just the right recipes (like vegetarian for them folks into sports).
planner.options:
We're gonna show you some recipes now. 
Give us a thumbs up if it looks tasty, or a thumbs down if it don't tickle your fancy. 

The system's learnin' from what you like so it can give you better ideas down the road.
planner.shoppinglist:
Once you've picked out enough recipes, you'll slide right on over to the shoppin' list. It's got everything you need for them meals. 

 Under 'Recipes', you'll find what you picked plus the directions. You can rate 'em and tell us what you think right there.

recipes.overview: Here's the whole spread of recipes on your shoppin' list, your own fixin's, and your favorites. You can open 'em up right here.
recipes.create: Tap that little plus sign up top to whip up your own recipe. Just tell us your idea, the AI's gonna cook it up, and you can even upload a picture of what's in your pantry.
recipes.addToList: If you wanna put one of your own recipes or a favorite onto your shoppin' list, just open it up and tap those three dots in the corner to add it.

tracker.overview:
Just write down what you've been eatin'. 

You can describe it just like you're talkin' to a neighbor, like 'a big ol' plate of noodles', or name the brand, or give us the exact calories—whatever suits your soul.
tracker.calorieGoal:
Set your daily calorie aim yourself or let us figure it out for you. 

Just put in your body details one time, and we'll take care of the rest, sugar.
tracker.activityTracking: Keep track of your exercise too, like 'joggin' for twenty minutes'. We'll figure out how many extra bites you can have today—all just for you.

setup.aboutApp: This here app was built private-like to make life a whole lot simpler with shoppin' lists and smart meal plannin'.

helpPage.title: Help & Kinna-How Videos
helpPage.intro: Here's a bunch of short videos showin' you how Murmli works. You can watch 'em anytime right here, open 'em on YouTube, or make 'em big on your screen.

overview.title: The Big Picture
overview.description: A quick look at Murmli and all the main spots in the app.

firstStart.title: Startin' Out
firstStart.description: How to get Murmli all set up the first time so you feel right at home.

shoppingList.title: The Shoppin' List
shoppingList.description: Good ideas for your smart list—additem', sortin', and sharin'.

planner.title: The Planner
planner.description: See how to plan your meals, tell us what you want, and get them automatic ideas.

calorieCounter.title: The Calorie Counter
calorieCounter.description: Keep an eye on your eatin' and movin' with the counter.

training.title: Workouts & Logs
training.description: Build your workout plans, write down your sets, and see how you're gettin' stronger.

settings.title: Settings & Partin' Words
settings.description: Everythin' 'bout your settings and a lil' look at what's comin' next.

general.errorMessage: Somethin' went sideways. Try again in a lick, or let us know 'bout this mess.

notifications.trainingPlanReadyMessage: Your new trainin' plan's been cooked up just for you.

feedback.title: New Lil' Message
feedback.success: Well looky here, some new feedback just rolled in 'bout a recipe.

deleteRecipeDialog.dialogMsg: You sure you wanna toss this recipe out?

general.voiceDialogInfo: We're listenin' right now. You can toss it anytime. If you send it, we'll get to workin' on it automatic-like.
general.name: Mister / Missus Name
general.moreInfo: A bit more info for ya

shoppingList.noItemsMessage: Ain't nothin' on the list yet, sugar.

sortCategoriesDialog.title: Sort them kinds
sortCategoriesDialog.text: Tap a category to set its place, or use them arrows.

removeRecipes.dialogMsg: You real sure you wanna get rid of all recipes from your list? The ingredients'll stay put and you gotta delete them separate-like.

removeIngredients.dialogMsg: You sure you wanna clear all the food items? The recipes'll stay right where they are in the recipe view.

clearAll.dialogMsg: You sure you wanna wipe this whole list clean?

deleteList.dialogMsg: You really wanna delete this entire shoppin' list?

shoppingList.voiceRecordingInfo: We're listenin' real close. You just talk natural 'bout what you need on your list. We'll handle the rest. If you wanna toss the recordin', you can. Long as you don't hit send, it stays right here on your gadget.
shoppingList.offlineMode: Out in the sticks - savin' things right here for now
shoppingList.pendingItemTooltip: This here'll save soon as we get a signal

planner.title: Meal Planner

filter.title: Filter Settings
filter.promptPlaceholder: Tell us what you're pinin' for

planner.fetchingMessage: We're fetchin' your recipes in the back. Just you sit tight.

resetSelectionDialog.dialogMsg: You sure you wanna clear out your recipe choices?

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.empty: You ain't whipped up any recipes yet.
recipes.noFavorites: You ain't got no favorites yet.

tips.swipeToRemove: Just swipe a recipe to the side to get rid of it.
tips.createOwn: Tap that plus sign up top to make your own.
tips.printPdf: Wanna print it out? Use that three-dot menu to make a PDF.
tips.editOwn: You can fix your own recipes anytime. Just open it and look for them three dots.
tips.feedbackPlanner: Recipe don't taste right? Open it up and give us some feedback in the menu.

createRecipeDialog.title: Whip up a Recipe
createRecipeDialog.text:
Tell us all about it: what's gotta be in there, and what you can't stand. The more you tell us, the better we can cook it up for ya.

It takes 'bout 2 or 3 minutes to appear in your list.

You can also add a photo—maybe of your fridge or some fresh garden pickin's!
createRecipeDialog.label: Recipe talk
createRecipeDialog.generatingText: Hold your horses, we're fixin' it now. It'll take a minute or two.

recipes.addIngreditensInfo: You sure you wanna put this recipe on your shoppin' list? All the ingredients'll go right on there.
recipes.processingMessage: We're fixin' your recipe in the back. We'll holler when it's done.

recipe.title: Recipe

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.label: Your thoughts
feedback.success:
Much obliged for the feedback!
We'll get right on it.

recipe.promoteStarted: We're puttin' it in the main pantry now.
recipe.promoteInfo: This here recipe's already in the official books.
recipe.shareText: Take a gander at this recipe!

chat.title: Recipe Talk
chat.welcomeMessage: Well hey there! I'm your recipe helper. Ask me anythin' 'bout the ingredients or how to cook 'em.

settings.title: Settings
settings.confirmDeleteText: You real sure you wanna delete your account for good? There ain't no comin' back from that.
settings.importWarningText: Importin' will wipe your current stuff and log you out. You sure?

adminStats.plannerWeek: Folks usin' the planner this here week
adminStats.shoppingUpdatedWeek: Grocery lists freshened up this week
adminStats.aiCacheSaved: AI questions we didn't have to ask twice
adminStats.stickiness: How much folks are stickin' around
adminStats.stickinessHint: The way we see how many folks come back every day compared to every month. If it's over 20%, they're makin' a real good habit of it.

feedback.title: Tending to the Feedback
feedback.noFeedback: Ain't no feedback here right now, sugar.
feedback.confirmDelete: Are you sure 'nough you wanna toss this feedback away?

adminStats.trainingLogs: Keepin' track of all that work

adminTools.title: Admin Tools
adminTools.confirmSendText: This goes to EVERY soul. You sure?
adminTools.sendSuccess: Message sent out to the whole wide world.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Holler at us through these ways

tracker.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your plate or your movin' 'round
tracker.activityRequired: Tell us what you did first.
tracker.createActivityInfo: Put your activities here, we'll figure the calories for ya.

palOptions.teacher: Teacher – just a bit of walkin' and standin'
palOptions.salesperson: Shopkeeper – standin', walkin', and a little light work
palOptions.nurse: Nurse – whole lot of walkin' and liftin' folks up
palOptions.sportsTeacher: Coach – real active, showin' folks how it's done
palOptions.constructionSite: Construction hand – real heavy liftin' and hard labor
palOptions.mountainGuide: Trail guide – 'bout as active as it gets, hikin' all day long

tracker.bodyDataInfo: Input your details so we can figure your targets. We'll use this for your daily aims.
tracker.errorNoBodydata: Gotta put in your body details first, sugar.
tracker.voiceRecordingInfo: Record's saved right here. Hit send to give it to us, or toss it.

acidBase.title: Acid-Base Balance
acidBase.balanced: Right as rain – your acid-base is site-down level
acidBase.acidic: A bit sour – might want to eat some more of them basic greens

histamine.title: Histamine
histamine.moderate: Some histamine – mind how you're feelin' if you're sensitive
histamine.high: Lots of histamine – might give you a lick of trouble if you're intolerant
histamine.label: Histamine
histamine.description: Tells ya if them vittles are gonna sit right with ya.

indicatorSettings.title: Fix markers
indicatorSettings.description: Pick markers to see on your food.
indicatorSettings.acidBaseDesc: Shows that PRAL number for your body's balance
indicatorSettings.histamineDesc: Shows the histamine so things go down easy

tracker.askDialog: Ask us 'bout eatin'. We'll use your data and the last two weeks of logs to try and help ya out.

chat.title: Tracker Helper
chat.welcomeMessage: Howdy! I'm your tracker helper. Ask me 'bout your calories or nutrients.

tracker.workDaysPAL: How hard you're workin' on your job days
tracker.errorBodydataActivity: Honey, if you wanna track your movin', you gotta put in your body stats first.
tracker.scaleGroupInfo: Now, go on 'n adjust that there portion for the whole plate. All them fixin's gonna be scaled just right, nice 'n slow.

trainingPlans.title: Workout Plans

step1.title: Build a plan
step1.content: Make your own plan, describe what you want, where you're at, and how hard you wanna go.

step2.title: Fix a plan
step2.content: If it ain't right, just tell us what to change in plain talk.

step3.title: Get to workin' out
step3.content: Logs your sets and weights. Afterward, we can send it right to the counter.

trainingPlans.voiceRecordingInfo: Just talk 'bout your plan. We'll turn it to text after you send it.
trainingPlans.createPlanInstructions:
Be real specific: What you trainin'? How often? Whereabouts? 

Like: 'Wanna hit the gym four times a week, focus on the upper body. I'm already in decent shape.'
trainingPlans.subtitle: Whip up and manage your workouts here.
trainingPlans.confirmDeletePlan: You really sure you wanna delete this plan?
trainingPlans.continuePlanDescription: Make a new one based on this plan. Add new wishes if you got 'em.
trainingPlans.noPlansInfo: No plans yet. Hit that plus button, y'all.

activateDialog.title: Start the plan
activateDialog.msg: When you start, we'll set the date. You sure?

finishDialog.title: Done workin' out
finishDialog.msg: This'll reset your progress. You sure?

trainingPlans.processingMessage: Fixin' your plan in the back. We'll holler when it's done.

publicRecipe.downloadDescription: Make and share your own recipes with the app!
